judge_result.short_rationale: It correctly says to remove contaminated clothing and wash skin with soap and water, but it omits the required immediate action to seek medical attention for any skin exposure. It also adds eye-rinsing guidance for a skin-only incident, which is a dangerous cross-incident unsupported instruction. Extra unsupported advice about creams/lotions is also added.
